arts.ttl: Real Madrid make Saliba 'decision' as Arsenal transfer priorities become clear
arts.sum: Real Madrid's desire to sign defensive reinforcements this summer is no secret given the number of injury problems Carlo Ancelotti has had to navigate this season. The end of the 2024/25 season is fast approaching, which means transfer news and rumours involving Arsenal are already dominating the headlines.

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal head to Everton in the Premier League this weekend aiming to keep alive their fading title hopes. The Gunners returned from the international break with a 2-1 win over Fulham on Tuesday, but remain 12 points adrift of Liverpool after the latter’s win over Everton the following day. Mikel Arteta will be keen to […] The post Arsenal XI vs Everton – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Arsenal simulated to predict huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: Goals from Mikel Merino and the returning Bukayo Saka saw Arsenal pick up a 2-1 win against Fulham in their last Premier League outing, but with Liverpool beating Everton 1-0 a day later, the Gunners remained 12 points off the top spot in the table. We predict that Arsenal could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Kiwior, Lewis-Skelly; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Merino, Martinelli.
